'''Akana''' was the dry and barren fourth [[Planet/Legends|world]] within the [[Elrood system/Legends|Elrood system]], located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. The surface itself only boasted life in the microbial range, although the [[Professiona Artists Guild]] maintained an artistic colony in a small, sealed outpost there. Its only [[Satellite/Legends|satellite]], [[Akanala]] was a source of inspiration for those artists.
